sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Westrock Coffee CEO Scott Ford Named to UA Board of Trustees
feed.summary: Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders has appointed Scott Ford, CEO and co-founder of Westrock Coffee, to the University of Arkansas board of trustees. Ford replaces Morril Harriman and his term will last until March 1, 2034. Sanders highlighted Ford's entrepreneurial success and leadership, stating he will be an invaluable member of the board.

feed.title: Stratasys acquires Arevo 3D printing assets and IP
feed.summary: Stratasys has acquired the technology portfolio and intellectual property (IP) of carbon fiber 3D printing firm Arevo, following an asset auction. Arevo, known for its AQUA 3D printers and later its SuperStrata bikes, ceased operations last year despite significant funding. Stratasys plans to leverage this IP, which includes carbon fiber 3D printing and AI-powered monitoring, to enhance its FDM technology, improve part isotropy, and boost 3D printer throughput for manufacturing applications.

feed.title: Understanding institutional real estate investing
feed.summary: Institutional investors like pension funds and sovereign wealth funds are crucial capital sources for commercial real estate, attracted by diversification and solid returns. They typically allocate 8% to 15% of their investments to real estate, often providing capital to developers and funds rather than investing directly. Attracting this capital requires extensive due diligence, a clear strategy, a strong track record, and sophisticated operations.

feed.title: TSMC, Samsung Lead Recovery In Asia's Emerging Markets With AI And Chip Sector Growth
feed.summary: Emerging markets, particularly in Asia, are recovering from 2022 losses, driven by tech giants like TSMC and Samsung, despite global headwinds. The recovery is fueled by demand in the AI and semiconductor sectors, offering attractive valuations compared to developed markets. While China risk remains, alternative ETFs excluding China provide options for investors.

feed.title: Bridgewater Bancshares (NASDAQ: BWB) launches $50M at-the-market stock offering
feed.summary: Bridgewater Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: BWB) has announced an at-the-market (ATM) stock offering of up to $50 million through an Equity Distribution Agreement with Piper Sandler & Co. This allows the company to periodically issue common stock for general corporate purposes, including investments, working capital, capital expenditures, stock repurchases, debt repayment, or financing acquisitions. Piper Sandler will receive a 2.5% commission on gross sales, and the company is not obligated to sell any shares.

feed.title: Boston Omaha (NYSE:BOC) - Stock Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides a stock analysis of Boston Omaha Corporation (NYSE:BOC), detailing its financial health, past performance, and recent news. It highlights the company's engagement in outdoor billboard advertising, surety insurance, broadband, and asset management. The analysis also covers stock performance metrics, earnings reports, and analyst coverage, indicating a current market capitalization of US$404.5 million with declining earnings over the past five years.

feed.title: BKHA Stock Price and Chart — NASDAQ:BKHA
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information and performance analysis for Black Hawk Acquisition Corporation (BKHA) on NASDAQ. It covers key statistics like market capitalization, P/E ratio, and basic EPS, along with technical indicators and historical price movements. The company is a blank check company founded on September 28, 2023, and the article also addresses frequently asked questions about its stock performance and financials.

feed.title: Should You Avoid WDAY Stock Amid Declining Estimate Revisions?
feed.summary: Workday (WDAY) is facing declining earnings estimate revisions for fiscal 2027 and 2028, signaling bearish sentiment. The company's growth is slowing due to market saturation in HR software, limited target clientele of large enterprises, and lack of geographical diversity. Increased competition, waning margins, and high operating expenses further pressure its financial performance, leading to a Zacks Rank #4 (Sell) recommendation.

feed.title: KLA (KLAC) Just Overtook the 20-Day Moving Average
feed.summary: KLA (KLAC) has recently surpassed its 20-day moving average, signaling a short-term bullish trend and making it a potential pick for investors. The company's stock has gained 12.9% over the past four weeks and holds a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), further supported by positive earnings estimate revisions. This combination of technical strength and favorable earnings outlook suggests further gains for KLAC.

feed.title: Baxter Joins the National Infusion Collaborative to Advance Infusion Safety and Best Practices
feed.summary: Bainbridge Health announced that Baxter International (NYSE:BAX) has joined the National Infusion Collaborative (NIC), an organization comprising over 800 healthcare entities focused on improving infusion safety and efficiency. Baxter's role will involve contributing its expertise in connected infusion systems and digital solutions through benchmarking, education, and collaborative projects. This partnership aims to strengthen efforts in advancing safer medication administration practices across the healthcare continuum.

feed.title: Arbitrators Vindicate Ex-Morgan Stanley Broker After $850K Client Settlement
feed.summary: A panel of arbitrators has cleared former Morgan Stanley broker Christiana Webb of wrongdoing in a customer dispute that resulted in an $850,000 settlement in 2024. The panel found the customer, not Webb, was responsible for the alleged losses due to large withdrawals, paving the way for Webb to clear her record. Despite customer and state regulator opposition, Webb, now with Truist Financial, secured the expungement.

feed.title: Coterra Energy (CTRA): UBS Raises Price Target to $38 | CTRA Sto
feed.summary: UBS analyst Josh Silverstein has maintained a "Buy" rating for Coterra Energy (CTRA) and raised the price target from $33 to $38, indicating confidence in the company's growth potential. This update comes amidst varied analyst ratings for CTRA in recent months, with some downgrades and other price target increases. The average target price from 23 analysts is $32.91, suggesting a 5.69% upside from the current price, while GuruFocus' estimated GF Value for CTRA is $30.57, suggesting a slight downside.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Sees Price Target Raised by UBS Analy
feed.summary: UBS analyst Josh Silverstein has maintained a Neutral rating on Occidental Petroleum (OXY) but raised the price target from $49.00 to $55.00, an increase of 12.24%. This follows a trend of several analysts increasing their price targets for OXY in late February 2026, signaling growing confidence in the company's stock potential. Despite these increases, the average target price from 24 analysts ($52.06) suggests a potential downside of 3.70% from the current price, and GuruFocus estimates a 20.14% downside based on its GF Value of $43.17.

feed.title: General Motors prepares to launch ‘SDVerse’ automotive software marketplace
feed.summary: General Motors, in partnership with Magna and Wipro, is set to launch SDVerse, a B2B automotive software marketplace. This platform aims to create an "automotive app store" for software developers to sell products to car manufacturers, addressing current inefficiencies in vehicle software development and implementation. It is expected to make automotive software development cheaper and faster.

feed.title: UBS Raises Target Price for NextEra Energy (NEE) to $104 | NEE S
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for NextEra Energy (NEE) to $104, up from $91, while maintaining a 'Buy' rating. This adjustment reflects a 14.29% increase and aligns with other recent positive analyst adjustments for the energy company. NextEra Energy, through its Florida Power & Light utility and NextEra Energy Resources segment, has seen a consistent bullish sentiment from analysts.

feed.title: Food News: Chipotle Opens, Broadway Deli for Sale, Primal Closes, New Chef, New Menu, More
feed.summary: This article provides an update on various food-related news in the Saratoga area. It covers the opening of a new Chipotle location in Malta, the listing for sale of Saratoga’s Broadway Deli, the sudden closure of Primal butcher shop, updates to the menu at Front Street Deli, the appointment of a new executive chef at Panza's, and the official opening celebration of Keuka Spring Vineyards' new tasting room. Additionally, an antique sale hosted by Sundaes Best Hot Fudge Sauce owner is announced.

feed.title: Brilliant Earth Group (NASDAQ:BRLT) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results, Misses Estimates By $0.08 EPS
feed.summary: Brilliant Earth Group (NASDAQ:BRLT) reported a Q4 loss of $0.06 EPS, missing analyst estimates by $0.08, with revenue of $124.4 million also falling short of expectations. Despite this, the quarter was the company's largest ever, contributing to full-year sales of $437.5 million, up 3.6% year-over-year. The company faces significant gross margin headwinds due to rising gold and platinum prices, with 2026 gross margin guided to the mid-50s% and Q1 adjusted EBITDA expected to be negative.

feed.title: RBC Capital Upgrades Builders FirstSource (BLDR) to Outperform
feed.summary: RBC Capital has upgraded Builders FirstSource (BLDR) to an "Outperform" rating, maintaining a price target of USD 119.00. This upgrade comes amidst varying analyst ratings, with the average target price from 24 analysts suggesting a 31.11% upside from the current price. GuruFocus estimates also indicate a potential upside of 40.04% for BLDR.

feed.title: Motorola Solutions Crosses 30% Operating Margins for the First Time: Here’s What It Means
feed.summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) has achieved a significant milestone by surpassing 30% full-year operating margins for the first time, driven by strong Q4 revenue growth, a record backlog, and success with its AI Assist Suites and Silvus acquisition. Despite recent insider stock disposals, analysts remain largely positive, with TIKR's valuation model suggesting substantial upside due to the company's transformation into a compounding software and AI ecosystem with durable pricing power. The market appears to be underpricing Motorola Solutions' shift towards higher-margin software and services.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Downgrades Duke Energy (DUK) Rating, Lowers Price T
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has downgraded Duke Energy (DUK) from 'Outperform' to 'In-Line' and reduced its price target from $143 to $139. This adjustment follows several other analyst updates, some of which also lowered price targets. Duke Energy is a major U.S. utility, and despite the downgrade, Wall Street analysts maintain an average "Outperform" recommendation with an implied upside, though GuruFocus estimates a downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Think Delta (DAL) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
feed.summary: This article examines analyst recommendations for Delta Air Lines (DAL), noting its average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.12, indicating a Strong Buy to Buy. However, it cautions against relying solely on ABRs due to potential brokerage firm bias, suggesting that the Zacks Rank, which is based on earnings estimate revisions, offers a more reliable indicator of near-term stock performance. With Delta currently holding a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), investors are advised to be cautious despite the favorable ABR for DAL.

feed.title: Cardinal (CAH) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
feed.summary: This article examines brokerage recommendations for Cardinal Health (CAH), noting its average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.25, indicating a "Strong Buy" to "Buy" consensus from 16 firms. However, it cautions against relying solely on these recommendations due to potential positive bias from brokerage firms' vested interests. Instead, it suggests validating such recommendations with tools like the Zacks Rank, which for CAH is currently a #2 (Buy), driven by positive earnings estimate revisions.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts Think KLA (KLAC) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
feed.summary: This article examines analyst recommendations for KLA (KLAC), noting its average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.77, indicating a "Buy" rating. However, it cautions against relying solely on these recommendations due to potential biases. Instead, it suggests combining ABR with the Zacks Rank, which for KLA is currently #2 (Buy), driven by recent positive earnings estimate revisions.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts AbbVie Price Target to $233 From $228, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has raised its price target for AbbVie (ABBV) shares to $233 from $228, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the pharmaceutical company. This adjustment reflects Evercore ISI's continued positive outlook on AbbVie's performance. The article also provides recent news about AbbVie, including developments in its drug trials and financial activities.

feed.title: Fincantieri Delivers Norwegian Luna
feed.summary: Fincantieri has delivered the Norwegian Luna to Norwegian Cruise Line at its Marghera shipyard in Venice, Italy. This vessel is the second in the expanded Prima Plus Class, following the Norwegian Aqua delivered in 2025. The Norwegian Luna is 10% larger than the original Prima-class ships, measuring 156,000 gross tons and offering over 3,550 berths.

feed.title: Callaway Golf Surges 55% in 6 Months: Is the Stock Still Attractive?
feed.summary: Callaway Golf Company (CALY) has seen its shares surge 55.4% in the past six months, significantly outperforming the industry. This growth is attributed to strategic moves such as divesting Jack Wolfskin and a stake in Topgolf, which generated cash to repay debt, and a renewed focus on its core golf equipment business. The company also benefits from strong golf participation trends, product innovation, and an attractive valuation compared to its peers, holding a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: CANF Stock Soars 20% on Positive Mid-Stage Pancreatic Cancer Data
feed.summary: Can-Fite BioPharma (CANF) shares surged 20.4% after reporting positive top-line results from a mid-stage study of namodenoson in patients with advanced pancreatic cancer. The study met its primary safety endpoint, showing strong tolerability, and survival monitoring is ongoing with one-third of enrolled patients still alive at the data cut-off. Namodenoson also holds the FDA's Orphan Drug designation for pancreatic cancer and is being evaluated for other indications like liver cancer and metabolic-associated steatohepatitis.

feed.title: SIMO Stock Surges 132% in Past Year: Should You Join the Bandwagon?
feed.summary: Silicon Motion Technology Corporation (SIMO) has seen a 132.1% stock surge over the past year, outperforming the industry and competitors like AMD and IBM. This growth is attributed to its strong portfolio, including leading client SSD controllers, innovation in PCIe Gen5 technology, and its fabless business model which allows for quick adoption of advanced manufacturing nodes. Analysts are optimistic, with earnings estimates for 2026 and 2027 significantly revised upwards, indicating strong potential for continued stock appreciation.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on EOG Resources to $158 From $149, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for EOG Resources from $149 to $158 while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's updated outlook on the oil and gas exploration and production company. The news comes alongside other recent analyst adjustments and insider trading activity for EOG Resources.

feed.title: Coke & Meals: Making Coca-Cola the preferred choice with food
feed.summary: Coca-Cola HBC's "Coke & Meals" platform aims to establish Coca-Cola, especially Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, as the preferred beverage for meals, turning everyday eating into enjoyable moments of connection. The platform leverages a global framework with local execution to create culturally relevant activations for consumers and value for customers. It integrates various brands from the portfolio across retail, digital, and mass media to drive engagement and enhance meal experiences year-round.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum continues investment in Alaska’s maritime training programs
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum has reaffirmed its commitment to maritime workforce development in Alaska with a new contribution to the Alaska Vocational Technical Center (AVTEC). This investment, totaling over $200,000 since 2018, supports scholarships and training programs, modernizing AVTEC's facilities and expanding access to credentialing for students pursuing maritime careers. The funding has upgraded bridge simulators and instructional technology, provided oil-spill response training vessels, and offered direct scholarships to over 30 students, reducing financial barriers to their education.

feed.title: Stocktwits Announces 2026 Cashtag Awards Presented by Polymarket, Hosted at the New York Stock Exchange
feed.summary: Stocktwits has announced the 2026 Cashtag Awards, presented by Polymarket, will be hosted on May 4th at the New York Stock Exchange. The awards will celebrate individuals, products, and platforms that are shaping the future of digital finance and trading, with winners selected by the Stocktwits community and a panel of industry leaders. The event will feature comedian Nathan Macintosh and is supported by several companies including ZenaTech, Tradier, Voyager, TradrETFs, and FintechTV.

feed.title: Mizuho Lowers BellRing Brands (NYSE:BRBR) Price Target to $34.00
feed.summary: Mizuho has reduced its price target for BellRing Brands (NYSE:BRBR) from $40.00 to $34.00, while maintaining an "outperform" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 93.18% from the stock's last closing price. Despite the lowered target, BellRing Brands recently surpassed quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $0.37 EPS and $537.3 million in revenue.

feed.title: Mizuho Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Chemours (NYSE:CC) Stock
feed.summary: Mizuho has increased its price target for Chemours (NYSE:CC) stock from $17.00 to $21.00, reiterating an "outperform" rating and implying a 20.21% upside from the previous closing price. Other firms like Morgan Stanley, Truist Financial, UBS Group, The Goldman Sachs Group, and Jefferies Financial Group have also recently updated their price targets and ratings on Chemours. The stock currently has an average "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $18.40, with institutional investors holding a significant portion of its shares.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Diamondback Energy Price Target to $216 From $194, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (FANG) to $216 from $194, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook on the oil and natural gas exploration and production company. The article also notes recent analyst activities for Diamondback Energy, with other firms like Benchmark downgrading the stock and several others adjusting their price targets.

feed.title: Analysts Push Dow Inc. Higher Amid Supply Shock
feed.summary: Dow Inc. (DOW) shares rose due to expectations of increased profits from its plastics business, driven by a global polyethylene supply disruption caused by the Iran conflict. Analysts have upgraded the stock and raised price targets, citing reduced short-term risk and improved earnings prospects. This situation is attracting traders seeking defensive growth in the chemicals sector.

feed.title: Fincantieri Delivers Norwegian Luna Cruise Vessel
feed.summary: Fincantieri has delivered the Norwegian Luna, the second vessel in Norwegian Cruise Line's expanded Prima Plus class, at its Marghera shipyard in Italy. This 156,000-gt ship is approximately 10% larger than previous Prima-class vessels and features new entertainment and recreation concepts, including the Aqua Slidecoaster and Ocean Boulevard. The delivery follows a new agreement between Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. and Fincantieri to build three next-generation cruise ships, with deliveries scheduled through 2037.

feed.title: Fastenal (FAST) Sees 13.3% Increase in February Sales
feed.summary: Fastenal (FAST) reported a significant 13.3% increase in net sales for February, reaching over $710 million, with daily sales also climbing by the same percentage. This growth is attributed to the company's strategy of expanding on-site locations and its role as a comprehensive outsourcing partner for industrial customers. Fastenal demonstrates strong financial health with impressive revenue growth, profitability metrics, and a conservative approach to leverage, though its valuation metrics indicate a premium trading position.

feed.title: Costco Stock Is Rising Ahead of Earnings as Comparable Sales Strengthen
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale's stock is rallying, recouping previous losses, as its 2026 fiscal year shows a stronger start compared to 2025. Investors are anticipating the company's fiscal second-quarter results on Thursday, with expectations of continued sales strength. Key focus areas include renewal rates, tariff refunds, and the possibility of another special dividend.

feed.title: Early 2026 Subaru Outback Buyers Get Hands-Free Driving Update
feed.summary: Subaru is rolling out a hands-free highway driving-assist system for early 2026 Outback buyers, which will be activated for free. This technology, called Highway Hands-Free Driving Assist, is available on the Touring and Touring XT trims and has been active on Outbacks purchased after January 19, 2026, with existing owners eligible for a free update. Unlike some competitors, Subaru's system does not require a subscription fee for its core functionality, though over-the-air map updates to expand its coverage will have a subscription.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Group Raises PPL Price Target to $44 | PPL Stock Ne
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has raised its price target for PPL (PPL) to $44 from $43, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating. This adjustment reflects continued positive sentiment from analyst Nicholas Amicucci. The average target price from 14 analysts is $40.54, implying a 6.57% upside, contrasting with GuruFocus' estimated GF Value of $36.10, which suggests a 5.1% downside.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Upgrades Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) to "Outperform"
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has upgraded Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) from "sector perform" to "outperform," setting a new price target of $119, indicating a potential 21% upside. This upgrade comes despite recent quarterly results that missed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Analyst sentiment for BLDR remains mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $127.81 from various firms.

feed.title: LADENBURG THALM/SH SH Reiterates "Sell" Rating for Edison International (NYSE:EIX)
feed.summary: LADENBURG THALM/SH SH has reiterated a "Sell" rating for Edison International (NYSE:EIX) with a $63 price target, suggesting an 11.7% potential downside. This comes despite Edison International beating quarterly EPS and revenue expectations and providing positive FY2026 and FY2027 guidance. Analyst opinions on EIX are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and an average price target of $68.56 from various firms.

feed.title: Sanford C. Bernstein Begins Coverage on Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR)
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein initiated coverage on Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with an "Outperform" rating and a $218 price target, indicating a potential 21% upside. Other analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target of $193.36. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: UBS Group Raises Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) Price Target to $55.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has raised its price target for Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) to $55.00 from $50.00, maintaining a "buy" rating and implying a potential upside of approximately 24% from its previous close. This revision follows Devon Energy's all-stock merger with Coterra and generally positive analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $47.85 among analysts. The article also details recent institutional investor activity, stock performance metrics, and key headlines impacting Devon Energy, including some positive outlooks and some negative sentiment from Zacks Research due to EPS estimate cuts.

feed.title: Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) Coverage Initiated at Sanford C. Bernstein
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein initiated coverage on Crown Castle (NYSE:CCI) with an Outperform rating and a $102 price target, indicating a potential 13.5% upside. This new rating contrasts with other recent analyst activity where several firms have cut price targets and ratings. Despite a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating, company insiders have recently sold shares, and institutional investors show mixed activity.

feed.title: Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) Raised to Hold at Zacks Research
feed.summary: Zacks Research upgraded Lamb Weston (NYSE:LW) from "strong sell" to "hold" despite several analysts cutting price targets, maintaining a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target of $53.00. The company's Q4 results slightly exceeded expectations, with EPS of $0.69 and revenue of $1.62 billion. Insider and institutional investments show confidence, as an insider bought 50,000 shares and major funds significantly increased their positions, with institutions now owning almost 90% of the stock.

feed.title: Expedia Expands with PredictHQ: Eyes on $8.1B Global Soccer Impact
feed.summary: Expedia Group Inc. has partnered with PredictHQ to integrate event-driven demand forecasting, aiming to capitalize on an estimated $8.1 billion in traveler spending linked to the 2026 global soccer tournament. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations, and analysts are optimistic about its future growth, particularly with the upcoming World Cup boosting travel demands. This strategic move and robust financial performance position Expedia as a leader in the global travel market.

feed.title: What Does the Market Think About Freeport-McMoRan Inc?
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan Inc.'s short interest as a percentage of float has decreased by 3.27% since its last report, with 33.94 million shares sold short, representing 2.37% of available shares. This decline in short interest suggests a more bullish market sentiment towards the stock. When compared to its peer group, Freeport-McMoRan has less short interest than most similar companies.

feed.title: Peering Into The Travelers Companies Inc's Recent Short Interest
feed.summary: The short interest in The Travelers Companies Inc (NYSE: TRV) has increased by 6.4% since its last report, with 3.95 million shares sold short, representing 1.83% of available shares. This higher short interest signals a more bearish sentiment from investors, although it does not guarantee a near-term stock price drop. Compared to its peers, The Travelers Companies Inc has lower short interest, with its peer group average standing at 3.50%.
